summary: Bug-fix verification for lane/guidance rendering starting from sky. Confirmed RoadFloor SVG container top=47% (507.594px on 1080 viewport = 47.0%), no lane markings above horizon, cyan guidance path tip sits just below the red lead-vehicle bbox, and dashed lane dividers still animate. All 16 required HUD testids present and intact.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: outer solid road-edge lines show a decreasing dashoffset while inner dashed lane dividers show increasing dashoffset. Visually both animate correctly (dashes flow toward viewer). If a strictly consistent direction is desired, unify the sign of the stroke-dashoffset delta in RoadScene.jsx animation loop.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix (lane starting from sky) verified in iteration_2. RoadFloor anchored at top=47%. Nothing to retest for this bug. Phase 1 HUD verified in iteration_1.
